entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Major cereal crop cultivated globally, particularly in Southeast Asia and South India

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: Region accounting for 95% of global rice production

entities.name: SOUTH INDIA
entities.description: Region where the studied traditional and modern rice varieties are cultivated

entities.name: TOTAL PHENOLIC CONTENT
entities.description: A measurable nutritional attribute evaluated in rice varieties

entities.name: VOLATILE ORGANIC COMPOUNDS
entities.description: Organic compounds with high vapor pressure profiled in rice varieties

entities.name: GAS CHROMATOGRAPHY–MASS SPECTROMETRY
entities.description: Analytical technique used to estimate and identify volatile organic compounds

entities.name: FATTY ACIDS
entities.description: A chemical class of volatile organic compounds including palmitic, elaidic, linoleic, and oleic acids

entities.name: TERPENES
entities.description: A chemical class of volatile organic compounds

entities.name: ALKANES
entities.description: A chemical class of volatile organic compounds

entities.name: ALKENES
entities.description: A chemical class of volatile organic compounds

entities.name: ALCOHOLS
entities.description: A chemical class of volatile organic compounds

entities.name: PHENOLS
entities.description: A chemical class of volatile organic compounds

entities.name: ESTERS
entities.description: A chemical class of volatile organic compounds

entities.name: AMIDES
entities.description: A chemical class of volatile organic compounds

entities.name: PALMITIC ACID
entities.description: A specific fatty acid compound found in rice, higher in modern varieties

entities.name: ELAIDIC ACID
entities.description: A specific fatty acid compound found in rice

entities.name: LINOLEIC ACID
entities.description: A specific fatty acid compound found in rice, higher in traditional varieties

entities.name: OLEIC ACID
entities.description: A specific fatty acid compound found in rice

entities.name: STEARIC ACID
entities.description: A compound found in traditional rice varieties but absent in modern ones

entities.name: BUTYRIC ACID
entities.description: A compound found in traditional rice varieties but absent in modern ones

entities.name: GLYCIDYL OLEATE
entities.description: A compound found in traditional rice varieties but absent in modern ones

entities.name: SEERAGA SAMBA
entities.description: A traditional rice variety from South India with high azulene content

entities.name: KICHILLI SAMBA
entities.description: A traditional rice variety from South India with high oleic acid content

entities.name: AZULENE
entities.description: A volatile compound found in the Seeraga samba rice variety

entities.name: NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Nutritional components of rice varieties

entities.name: AROMA
entities.description: Scent characteristics of rice varieties

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine the distinctness of traditional and modern rice varieties
